reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.308(a)(1)(ii)(B) focuses on risk management, which involves ensuring that access is controlled, data is protected, and activities are logged. In Kubernetes, this translates to enforcing least privilege through RBAC, securing network access with NetworkPolicies, encrypting sensitive data such as secrets, and enabling audit logging to monitor and track access and changes.
title: 164_308_a_1_ii_b: 164.308(a)(1)(ii)(B) Risk Management
